settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage language and app preferences.
settings.languageHint: Choose the app language for labels and common pages.
settings.comingSoonHint: Theme, currency, and account preferences can be added here next.
settings.helpSubtitle: Reach out by email, call, or WhatsApp. If the issue is complicated, send a message and we will help you out.
settings.personalHint: Personal finance book with interest-based debt and credit.
settings.shopHint: Shop ledger for short-term customer and supplier credit without interest.
settings.aiHint: Turn this on if you want future smart help features in the app.
settings.aiOnHint: You can use AI features when they are available.
settings.aiOffHint: AI features stay hidden until you switch them on.

dashboard.quickHealthHint: Simple checks from your current numbers
dashboard.recentDebtCreditHint: Latest records and their current state
dashboard.noDebtCredit: No debt or credit records yet.
dashboard.incomeCoveredByExpense: of income currently covered by expenses
dashboard.cashDirectionHint: Based on income minus expense totals
dashboard.debtCreditDirectionHint: Net position = active credit minus active debt
dashboard.clearDueHint: Finish active debt or credit and post interest automatically
dashboard.addCashMovementHint: Keep income and expense up to date
dashboard.reviewJournalHint: Check accounting vouchers and audit subsections
